overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban commercial district. The character walks along an orange-textured sidewalk, stops at a crosswalk intersection, turns around, and continues through covered walkways beneath concrete overpasses lined with holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange sidewalk toward the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: textured brick wall with closed metal shutters and pipes
large pink neon advertisement on distant building facade
rain-slicked street reflecting neon lights from buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a commercial sidewalk at night. A textured brick wall runs along the left side while the street sits to the right. The orange diamond-patterned pavement is distinctive, and neon signs glow in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk toward the camera.

events.description: character stops at crosswalk and turns around to walk back
dark colored vehicle passes by on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: stopping at the crosswalk, then turning around to walk back the way they came

notable_agents.action: person in blue vest standing near crosswalk using a phone

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
building facade illuminated with purple and blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide intersection with a yellow-striped crosswalk. After stopping briefly, they turn around to head back. A person in a blue vest stands near the crosswalk using their phone, and vehicles pass by on the wet street. The neon billboards shift from right to left as the camera turns.

events.description: entering covered area beneath large concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing beneath the overpass

entered.detail: concrete wall with white graffiti text and green paint
massive concrete overpass spanning across the street overhead
tall orange street lamp with multiple light fixtures

segments.scene_description: Walking back along the street, the scene transitions to a semi-covered area beneath a massive concrete overpass. A graffiti-covered wall runs along the left side while vehicles pass on the right. The lighting becomes a mix of neon and artificial overhead lights as the sky becomes mostly obscured.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with vertical advertisements

events.description: lighting shifts to deeper neon tones with more prominent purple and red advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered urban walkway toward the distant intersection

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: series of tall vertical digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements
white and orange striped construction fencing along the wall
enclosed glass walkway bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The walkway becomes more enclosed, forming an urban canyon lined with vertical neon advertisements on the left. Construction barriers line the wall, and an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead. The lighting shifts to deeper neon tones dominated by purple and red hues from the digital billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked commercial district that shifts from an open neon-lit street into a claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins by moving along a textured orange diamond-patterned sidewalk beside a brick wall, with sparse pedestrians appearing under the glow of distant neon signs. As the camera reaches a yellow-striped crosswalk, it pauses briefly before turning around, causing the surrounding billboards to shift perspective while vehicles pass on the wet asphalt. The scene then transitions beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the open sky is replaced by a graffiti-covered wall and a mix of artificial overhead lighting. Finally, the walkway becomes more enclosed and dominated by deep purple and red hues as the camera moves past construction barriers and vertical digital advertisements toward an overhead pedestrian bridge.
